title: Find My Device - Don't Allow - Cancel [Deprecated for IOS]
scenario: Verify that tapping "Don't Allow" and "Cancel" on the Find My Device location permission prompts navigates back to the Poly Lens Menu and that the same permission prompts reappear on subsequent attempts.
expected: Location permission prompt appears with options "Allow Once", "Allow while using app", "Don't allow". After tapping "Don't Allow", another permission prompt appears with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" while FMD screen is visible in background. Tapping "Cancel" navigates back to Poly Lens Menu. Repeating the flow shows the same permission prompts.
